name: skillpilot-lifecycle
description: Status-bar TTL and MCP cleanup for SkillPilot skill sessions (begin_task / load). Register from .skillpilot/session.json or clipboard.

commands.title: Register Active Skill from Load JSON

skillpilot.serverEntry.markdownDescription: Absolute path to SkillPilot `dist/index.js`. Required for MCP cleanup. Repo root = **parent of `dist/`** (used to find `.skillpilot/session.json`).

skillpilot.skillRoot.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the `skills/` folder. Optional; repo root = parent of `skills/`. Used when resolving `.skillpilot/session.json`.

skillpilot.autoCleanupOnTtl.description: Call MCP cleanup when the status-bar TTL expires.

skillpilot.promptBeforeCleanup.description: Show a confirmation dialog before running cleanup when TTL expires.

skillpilot.ttlMsOverride.description: If greater than 0, use this TTL in milliseconds instead of the value from load/begin_task.

skillpilot.autoRegisterSession.description: Watch .skillpilot/session.json and start status-bar TTL automatically when it changes.
